items.name: utils
items.title: Utils
items.description: Utility functions for elorm/ui components.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Displays a button or a component that looks like a button.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Displays a form input field.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Displays a form textarea.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Renders an accessible label associated with controls.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A control that allows the user to toggle between checked and not checked.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Displays a list of options for the user to pick from.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Extends the Dialog component to display content that complements the main content.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Displays a menu to the user triggered by a button.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A popup that displays information related to an element.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Displays a card with header, content, and footer.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Visually or semantically separates content.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Use to show a placeholder while content is loading.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty State
items.description: A block for displaying empty or no-results states.

items.name: stat-card
items.title: Stat Card
items.description: A dashboard stat card with optional trend indicator.

items.name: page-header
items.title: Page Header
items.description: A page header block with title, description, actions, and breadcrumbs.
